name: Streusel Chocolate Chip Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. To prepare batter, in a large bowl, beat cake mix, pudding mix, oil, eggs, vanilla, and 1 cup water with an electric mixer on medium speed for 2 minutes.
To prepare streusel, in a medium bowl, mix together chocolate chips, walnuts, brown sugar, and cinnamon. Pour half of the batter into a greased and floured 12-cup bundt pan. Top evenly with half of the streusel mixture. Add remaining batter, then remaining streusel. Gently swirl the streusel through the batter with a knife.
Bake for 50-60 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool in the pan on a rack for 15-20 minutes, then invert onto a serving plate to cool completely. Before serving, sprinkle with powdered sugar.
